metadata.description: Find an apartment in Israel - instant alerts based on your filters.

Login.subtitle: Instant alerts about new apartments in Israel, based on your filters.

Cities.sectionDescription: Add a city, then its neighborhoods. You can add multiple cities.
Cities.emptyState: No city selected. Add a city to get started.

SignInCode.subject: Your sign-in code: {otp}
SignInCode.heading: Your sign-in code for Apartment Finder
SignInCode.instruction: Enter the following code on the sign-in page:
SignInCode.expiry: This code expires in {minutes} minutes. If you didn't request it, you can ignore this email.

FilterSettings.unknownsQuestion: If a listing doesn't say whether it has, say, an elevator or parking that you marked as a must-have - what should we do?
FilterSettings.unknownsNotifyLabel: Send me the alert anyway - I'll decide for myself
FilterSettings.unknownsNotifyHelp: Recommended if you'd rather see more listings and filter manually. We'll mark which field we couldn't verify.
FilterSettings.unknownsStrictLabel: Skip it - only alert me when every must-have is confirmed
FilterSettings.unknownsStrictHelp: You'll get fewer alerts, but each one will definitely meet all your hard requirements.

Matches.title: Apartments
Matches.description: The apartments we find for you will appear here, based on your filters.
Matches.comingSoonBody: Matching apartments will appear here in an organized inbox. For now, alerts are sent to the destinations you configured.

Onboarding.firstPrompt: Hi. In a few questions we will set up accurate apartment alerts. You can add several cities, each with its own neighborhoods. First, which city should we start with?
Onboarding.alreadyOnboardedPrefix: You already completed onboarding. You can continue here and update your preferences, or edit them directly in
Onboarding.citySelectedMessage: I chose {city}. You can show neighborhoods in this city.
Onboarding.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
